data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft Are Big Earnings Movers; Oil Prices Keep Rising
data.description: Stock futures experienced a decline due to a slump in earnings for tech giants Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta, while Google saw an increase. Oil prices are on the rise, and Federal Reserve Chair Powell has confirmed he will remain in his position. The Dow Jones Futures show significant movements from Google, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft due to their earnings reports, while oil prices continue to surge.

data.title: GIGABYTE Wins Red Dot Design Award Across Its AI Product Lineup
data.description: In Taipei on April 29, 2026, GIGABYTE, a top computer brand globally, revealed that its AI products have won accolades from the Red Dot Design Award in graphics card, motherboard, and laptop categories. This recognition signifies the company's unified strategy in developing indigenous AI technologies.

data.title: Bitcoin futures show caution with long-to-short ratio signaling shift. Fed maintains rates as BTC struggles to surpass range peaks. Are bears resurfacing?
data.description: As Bitcoin derivatives gain attention, showcasing traders’ apprehension amidst the Federal Reserve maintaining interest rates and Bitcoin's struggle to surpass its recent high range, speculation arises about a possible return of bearish sentiment.

data.title: Huawei Launches Xinghe AI Network Security Agentic SOC to Build Next-Generation Autonomous Intelligent Security Operations
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 30, 2026, Huawei introduced its revolutionary Xinghe AI Network Security Agentic SOC on a worldwide scale. This innovative system is specifically crafted to assist businesses in creating advanced autonomous intelligent security operations systems, ensuring the protection of digital transformation processes in various sectors. Richard Wu, serving as the President of the company, highlighted the importance of this development in enhancing cybersecurity measures for companies globally.

data.title: D3 Bio Presents KRAS Pipeline Updates at AACR 2026; Elisrasib (D3S-001), a Next-Generation KRAS G12C Inhibitor, Shows Strong Phase 2 Efficacy Across Multiple Tumor Types
data.description: Results from the phase 2 clinical trial of Elisrasib as a standalone treatment show significant effectiveness in three primary types of tumors when administered at the recommended phase 2 dose of 600 mg once daily. For patients with KRAS G12Ci–naïve non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) at the second line or beyond, the treatment resulted in an objective response rate (ORR) of 58.8% with a median progression-free survival (mPFS) of 12.2 months. In the case of patients with colorectal cancer (CRC) also at the second line or beyond, the ORR was 46.9% with a mPFS of 9.5 months.

data.title: YXT.com Filed 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: YXT.com Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YXT), a company specializing in AI-enabled enterprise productivity solutions based in Suzhou, China, has submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025 to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing took place on April 29, 2026. Interested parties can access the annual report on the Company’s investor relations website at https://ir.yxt.com.
